# BP-117 positive variant: an aliased Echo context still discards Bind's error.
lang: go
file: BP-117-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: echo
---
package sample

import echo "github.com/labstack/echo/v4"

func remove(ctx echo.Context) error {
	var request struct {
		ID string `json:"id"`
	}
	ctx.Bind(&request)
	return nil
}
